hero.title: Regal confidence. Sculpted femininity.
hero.subtitle: A curated wardrobe of deliberate silhouettes, tactile fabrics, and couture-grade finishing—built for women who collect details as art.
hero.caption: Editorial frame placeholder — drop your hero visual here.

philosophy.title: Brand Philosophy
philosophy.text: We believe in the power of a perfectly tailored silhouette to transform not just how you look, but how you move through the world. Every piece is designed to last — not just seasons, but years. Crafted with intention, finished by hand, meant to be treasured. REINASLEO is for women who understand that true luxury lives in the details others might miss.
statements: We believe in the power of a perfectly tailored silhouette to transform not just how you look, but how you move through the world.
Every piece is designed to last—not just seasons, but years. Crafted with intention, finished by hand, meant to be treasured.
REINASLEO is for women who understand that true luxury lives in the details others might miss.

editorialCard.quote: Luxury lies in the details you feel, not the ones you see.
editorialCard.label: Our Story
editorialCard.title: Behind the Atelier
editorialCard.description: How each piece comes to life — from the first sketch to the final stitch. A journey where nothing is left to chance.

silhouette.title: Silhouette
silhouette.body: Architected lines that honor the body—elongated proportions, sculpted waists, poised structure without stiffness.

details.title: Details
details.body: French seams, hand-tacked linings, custom-dyed trims. Every edge is considered to feel intimate and intentional.

craft.title: Craft
craft.body: Small-batch atelier production with couture-influenced finishing. Made to last, made to feel personal.

atelier.title: A quiet, disciplined atelier for women who notice everything.
atelier.body: REINASLEO collections are assembled in focused capsules—allowing time for fabric testing, pattern refinements, and hand-finishing. Each release is meant to be lived in, layered, and treasured.

fabric.title: Fabric
bullets: Custom dye baths in house palette

newsletter.title: Quiet drops, first access.
newsletter.body: Receive atelier release notes, fitting invitations, and new collection drops. No noise—just the essentials.
newsletter.consent: I agree to receive updates and consent to data processing.

philosophy.title: We create looks, not just clothing
philosophy.text: Every piece in the REINASLEO collection is part of a curated look where silhouette, texture, and colour work together. We believe true style is the harmony of details.

looks.title: Stylist-curated looks
looks.text: Every item comes with a selection of pieces that perfectly complement the look.
looks.point2: Every piece is part of a cohesive look

process.title: How we create
process.step1text: Exploring silhouettes, fabrics, and the season's colour palette.
process.step2text: Couture techniques combined with practicality. Every detail is verified.
process.step3text: Professional stylists assemble looks — complete outfits for any occasion.

values.title: What sets us apart
values.qualityText: Only the finest materials from Italy and France
values.handcraftText: Attention to every detail and seam

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Order inquiries, collaboration ideas, or feedback — we are happy to help.

product.deliveryBody: Standard delivery 3–5 business days. Free returns within 30 days of purchase. Items must be unworn with tags attached.

collections.title: Seasonal Collections
collections.subtitle: Each season tells its own story through fabric, silhouette, and color.

winter.name: Winter Collection
winter.description: Structured warmth — wool coats, cashmere layers, and evening silhouettes for the coldest months.

spring.name: Spring Collection
spring.description: Light transitions — flowing blouses, tailored trousers, and soft palettes for the new season.

summer.name: Summer Collection
summer.description: Effortless movement — silk dresses, linen tops, and resort-ready pieces for warm days.

autumn.name: Autumn Collection
autumn.description: Rich textures — midi skirts, knit cardigans, and tailored suits in deep seasonal tones.

sections.heading: 1. General Provisions
sections.body: This Policy is developed in accordance with Federal Law of the Russian Federation No. 152-FZ of 27.07.2006 'On Personal Data' and defines the procedure for processing personal data of users of reinasleo.com. Operator of personal data: Sole proprietor Romanova Kseniya Aleksandrovna, Tax ID (INN) 781300971051, Registration ID (OGRNIP) 321784700010380, registered address: 197198, Saint Petersburg, Petrovsky Municipal District, Gatchinskaya St., 12, apt. 20, email: reinasleo@gmail.com. By using the website, the user confirms acceptance of this Policy and consents to the processing of personal data on the terms described herein.

sections.heading: 2. Categories of Subjects and Data Collected
sections.body: Subjects of personal data are website visitors, registered users, and customers. Personal data processed: last name, first name, patronymic, email address, phone number, delivery address, date of birth (upon registration), Telegram account identifier and name (if linked), order history, website interaction data (cookies, IP address, device and browser information). Special categories of personal data and biometric data are not processed.

sections.heading: 3. Purposes of Processing
sections.body: The Operator processes personal data for the following purposes: user account registration and management; order placement, processing, and delivery; customer service and support communications; sending informational and marketing messages (only with separate consent); improving website performance and service quality; compliance with the legislation of the Russian Federation.

sections.heading: 4. Legal Grounds for Processing
sections.body: Processing is carried out on the following legal grounds: consent of the data subject (Article 6 of 152-FZ); performance of a contract to which the subject is a party (public offer of the website); Federal Law No. 152-FZ; Russian Consumer Protection Law; Tax Code of the Russian Federation and the Federal Law 'On Accounting'.

sections.heading: 5. Methods, Terms, and Location of Processing
sections.body: Personal data is processed with or without automation and includes collection, recording, systematization, accumulation, storage, clarification, extraction, use, transfer, anonymization, blocking, deletion, and destruction. Personal data of citizens of the Russian Federation is stored in databases located on the territory of the Russian Federation in accordance with Part 5 of Article 18 of 152-FZ. Processing duration: until the purposes of processing are achieved or consent is withdrawn; accounting and tax records are retained for the period established by the legislation of the Russian Federation (at least 5 years).

sections.heading: 6. Transfer to Third Parties
sections.body: The Operator does not sell or transfer personal data to third parties without the subject's consent, except: transfer to payment service providers for order payment; transfer to delivery services for order fulfilment; transfer to state authorities in cases provided by the legislation of the Russian Federation. All engaged parties are obliged to maintain confidentiality and ensure the security of personal data.

sections.heading: 7. Rights of the Data Subject
sections.body: The data subject has the right to: obtain information about the processing of their data; request clarification, blocking, or destruction of personal data; withdraw consent to processing at any time; appeal the Operator's actions to the Federal Service for Supervision of Communications, Information Technology and Mass Media (Roskomnadzor) or to court. Requests should be sent to reinasleo@gmail.com. A response is provided within 30 days of receiving the request.

sections.heading: 8. Security Measures and Cookies
sections.body: The Operator implements the necessary legal, organizational, and technical measures to protect personal data from unauthorized or accidental access, destruction, modification, blocking, copying, and distribution: encrypted data transmission channels (HTTPS), employee access restrictions, regular security audits. The website uses essential cookies for basic functionality, analytics cookies to assess usage, and preference cookies. Cookie management is available in browser settings.

sections.heading: 9. Policy Changes and Operator Details
sections.body: The Operator reserves the right to modify this Policy. The current version is published at reinasleo.com/privacy. Operator contact details for inquiries: Sole proprietor Romanova Kseniya Aleksandrovna, Tax ID (INN) 781300971051, Registration ID (OGRNIP) 321784700010380, registered address: 197198, Saint Petersburg, Petrovsky Municipal District, Gatchinskaya St., 12, apt. 20, email: reinasleo@gmail.com.

sections.heading: 1. General Provisions
sections.body: These Terms of Service govern your use of the REINASLEO website and services. By accessing or using our website, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

sections.heading: 2. Registration and Account
sections.body: To place orders and access certain features, you must create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activity under your account. You agree to provide accurate and complete information during registration.

sections.heading: 3. Rules of Use
sections.body: You agree not to use our website for any unlawful purpose, interfere with the operation of the website, upload malicious content, attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems, or use automated tools to scrape or collect data without our prior written consent.

sections.heading: 4. Intellectual Property
sections.body: All content on this website — including designs, photographs, text, logos, and graphics — is the property of REINASLEO or its licensors and is protected by copyright and trademark laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our explicit permission.

sections.heading: 5. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: REINASLEO provides the website and services "as is" without warranties of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of our services.

sections.heading: 6. Orders and Payments
sections.body: All orders are subject to availability and confirmation. Prices are displayed in euros and include applicable taxes. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel orders in cases of pricing errors, suspected fraud, or stock unavailability. Payment is processed securely through our authorized payment providers.

sections.heading: 7. Changes to Terms
sections.body: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Changes take effect upon posting to the website. Your continued use of our services after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised terms. We encourage you to review these terms regularly.

sections.heading: 8. Contact Information
sections.body: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at reinasleo@gmail.com. For legal inquiries, you may also reach us by post at our registered office address.

philosophy.title: Brand Philosophy
philosophy.heading: In short
philosophy.body1: We make premium womenswear where quality is visible and comfort is felt. No slogans — just pieces that work in real life.
philosophy.body2: Every design starts with fit: silhouette, balance, fabric, and hardware — everything in its right place.

comfort.title: Comfort
comfort.text: Freedom in movement and rhythm of the day.

honestCut.title: Honest cut
honestCut.text: The silhouette works with the figure, not against it.

longevity.title: Longevity
longevity.text: Pieces that stay in the wardrobe for years.

care.subtitle: REINASLEO
care.title: Garment Care
care.intro: Every REINASLEO piece deserves thoughtful care. Follow our guidelines to preserve the beauty and quality of your garments.

notFound.title: page not found
notFound.description: We couldn't find this piece in our collection. It may have been taken off display or the tag came loose.

serverError.title: atelier on pause
serverError.description: Our craftsmen are sorting out a small server hiccup. It usually takes a few minutes — try refreshing or come back shortly.

forbidden.title: by invitation only
forbidden.description: This area is closed to the public. Access is reserved for private-circle clients, editors and invited guests.

offline.title: signal perdu
offline.description: Looks like your internet has gone offline. Your cart and favorites are safe — we'll be back as soon as the connection returns.
